raw_consumer_statement:
I am filing a formal complaint against Citibank for failing to conduct a reasonable, good-faith investigation into a disputed, fraudulent charge of {$310.00} from a merchant ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX 

Despite my status as a XXXX customer who pushes over {$120000.00} in annual transaction volume through my Citibank accounts XXXX the dispute department summarily closed my claim in the merchant 's favor based on entirely inadequate and unverified 'evidence. ' The merchant provided an undated, tightly cropped photograph of a pre-existing dry mark on a car seat, lacking any timestamp, vehicle identifier, or context. Furthermore, the merchant failed to produce any pre-rental inspection documentation proving the mark was not a pre-existing condition before I took possession of the vehicle. 

Citibank accepted this invalid photo as undeniable proof, demonstrating a complete failure to uphold their dispute resolution obligations under the Fair Credit Billing Act to protect consumers from arbitrary and unsupported merchant penalties. I am requesting an immediate executive review of this dispute and a permanent reversal of the {$310.00} charge.
